name: GitHub Webhook Delivery
description: A record of a webhook delivery from GitHub, including the request headers, payload, and response information.

id.description: The unique identifier of the webhook delivery.

guid.description: The globally unique identifier for the delivery (X-GitHub-Delivery header).

delivered_at.description: The date and time the delivery was made.

redelivery.description: Whether this delivery is a redelivery of a previous delivery.

duration.description: The time in seconds the delivery took.

status.description: The HTTP status description returned by the receiver.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code returned by the receiver.

event.description: The event type that triggered the delivery (X-GitHub-Event header).

action.description: The action within the event that triggered the delivery.

installation_id.description: The GitHub App installation ID, if applicable.

repository_id.description: The repository ID associated with the delivery.

url.description: The API URL for the delivery record.

DeliveryRequest.description: The HTTP request that was sent to the webhook receiver.

headers.description: The HTTP headers sent with the request.

X-GitHub-Hook-ID.description: Unique identifier for the webhook configuration.

X-GitHub-Event.description: The name of the event that triggered the delivery.

X-GitHub-Delivery.description: A GUID to uniquely identify the delivery.

X-Hub-Signature-256.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of the payload, prefixed with sha256=.

X-Hub-Signature.description: Legacy HMAC-SHA1 hex digest of the payload, prefixed with sha1=.

X-GitHub-Hook-Installation-Target-Type.description: The type of resource the webhook is installed on.

X-GitHub-Hook-Installation-Target-ID.description: The unique identifier of the resource the webhook is installed on.

Content-Type.description: The content type of the payload.

payload.description: The JSON payload that was sent.

DeliveryResponse.description: The HTTP response received from the webhook receiver.

payload.description: The response body returned by the receiver.
